headline: Trump 🍊👑 IRAN BOMB 💣🔥 CEASEFIRE BREAK 💔🚀 STRAIT OF HORMUZ DRONE DRAMA 🛳️💥
text: US 🇺🇸🦅 and Iran 🇮🇷🦁 trading MISSILE SPICY STRIKES 💥🦅 after accusing each other of CEASEFIRE CHEATING 🛑🤥 in the STRAIT OF HORMUZ 🚢💦! Iran says they launched RETALIATORY MISSILES at US INFRASTRUCTURE in KUWAIT 🐪💨 and BAHRAIN 🏝️🔥 after the US hit MULTIPLE TARGETS across Iran like they were playing WHACK-A-MOLE 🕹️💣! US CENTCOM said they went FULL BEAST MODE on IRAN'S MILITARY EQUIPMENT, COMMS SYSTEMS, AIR DEFENSE SITES and DRONE STORAGE FACILITIES because Iran broke the CEASEFIRE with a ONE-WAY ATTACK DRONE that hit MT KIKU the PANAMA-FLAGGED TANKER 🚁💥! In RETALIATION IRGC fired BALLISTIC MISSILES and DRONES at EIGHT KEY INFRASTRUCTURE SPOTS in KUWAIT'S ALI AL-SALEM BASE 🛡️💥 and BAHRAIN'S FIFTH NAVAL FLEET PORT SALMAN 🌊🔥, claiming they DESTROYED THEM like a MIC DROP 🗣️🍆! Trump 🍊👑 posted on TRUTH SOCIAL that TEHRAN might NEVER LEARN and if they keep this up the ISLAMIC REPUBLIC OF IRAN WILL NO LONGER EXIST like a BAD NETFLIX SHOW 🗑️📺! KUWAIT and BAHRAIN activated AIR DEFENSE SYSTEMS like they were in a REAL-LIFE ACTION MOVIE 🎥💣 and told citizens to STAY CALM and head to the NEAREST SAFE PLACE like a HUNGER GAMES TRIBUTE 🏃‍♂️🏠! NO US CASUALTIES or MAJOR DAMAGE reported, but the STRAIT OF HORMUZ is still the OIL and GAS HIGHWAY 🚛🛢️ that got SHUT DOWN earlier causing GLOBAL OIL PRICES to MOON 🚀💸 and FERTILIZER SHIPMENTS to GHOST 👻🌾! The MEMORANDUM OF UNDERSTANDING signed on JUNE 17 was supposed to give 60 DAYS of TOLL-FREE SAFE PASSAGE but Iran says VIOLATING SHIPS will get CRUSHING RESPONSES and warned the US of a COMPLETE HALT to the PEACE PROCESS if they keep BREAKING the TREATY like a BAD RELATIONSHIP 💔📜! TRUMP said if Iran tries to CHARGE TOLLS or INSURANCE FEES negotiations would END IMMEDIATELY like a BAD FIRST DATE 🚫💰! IRAN and OMANI OFFICIALS met in MUSCAT to talk about FUTURE NAVIGATION MANAGEMENT but IRAN'S CHIEF NEGOTIATOR MOHAMMED BAGHER GHALIBAF says the STRAIT OF HORMUZ will NEVER GO BACK to the way it was before the WAR like a BAD EX who keeps TEXTING 📱😤! COMMERCIAL VESSELS are still operating in the STRAIT but everyone is on EDGE like they're watching a REALITY TV SHOW FINALE 📺😱! The LATEST STRIKES came less than a day after the US launched RETALIATORY STRIKES on IRAN for a DRONE ATTACK on SINGAPORE-FLAGGED CARGO SHIP MV EVER LOVELY on JUNE 25, with CENTCOM calling it a POWERFUL RESPONSE to UNWARRANTED AGGRESSION against COMMERCIAL SHIPPING like they were the BOUNCERS at an EXCLUSIVE CLUB 🕺💥! IRAN said the CARGO SHIP was attacked for using an UNAUTHORISED ROUTE and blamed the TREATY-BREAKING US REGIME for the whole MESS like a BAD BREAKUP TEXT 💔📱! The STRAIT OF HORMUZ was effectively CLOSED by TEHRAN after the US and ISRAEL launched ATTACKS on IRAN at the end of FEBRUARY causing a SPIKE in GLOBAL OIL PRICES and preventing shipments of FERTILISER like a BAD SUPPLY CHAIN NIGHTMARE 🚫🛢️! TRUMP and other US OFFICIALS insisted negotiations with IRAN were PROGRESSING WELL and that IRAN had given up any suggestion of TOLLING VESSELS through the STRAIT OF HORMUZ like they were getting a BAD HAIRCUT 💇‍♂️🚫! In a TRUTH SOCIAL POST TRUMP said IRAN informed the US there would be NO TOLLS, NO INSURANCE COSTS and NO OTHER CHARGES of any kind being sought or received like a BAD BUSINESS DEAL 🤝💰! The US has CONDEMNED reports that IRAN is CHARGING FEES to TANKERS going through the STRAIT and many see any TOLLING SYSTEM as breaking with INTERNATIONAL MARITIME LAW like a BAD PARKING TICKET 🚗💸! IRAN'S CHIEF NEGOTIATOR says everyone should know that the ADMINISTRATION of the STRAIT OF HORMUZ will NEVER GO BACK to the way it was before the WAR like a BAD SEQUEL NOBODY ASKED FOR 🎬😤!
